### Summary
- What changed?

### Context / Why
- Why is this change necessary? What problem does it solve?

### Related Issue
- Link to related issue or discussion (e.g., #123)

### Validation
- [ ] `just ci` passes locally
- [ ] New tests added/passing
- [ ] Manual verification performed (please describe)

### Notes
- Risks, migrations, or technical debt introduced
- Reviewer-specific context
